entries.name: No single official count
entries.equation: strict laws ~ 30-60; major laws/equations ~ 400-700; specialised correlations > 1000
entries.description: Physics has no world registry of laws; this compendium includes laws, principles, postulates, theorems and named equations used as laws.
entries.section: Scope, counting rules and universal structure

entries.name: Dimensions of mechanics
entries.description: Mass, length and time form the base dimensions for most classical mechanics.
entries.section: Scope, counting rules and universal structure

entries.name: Dimensions of charge
entries.description: Electric charge is current integrated over time.
entries.section: Scope, counting rules and universal structure

entries.name: Dimensional homogeneity
entries.equation: each term in an equation must have the same dimensions
entries.description: A core consistency law behind all physical formula checking.
entries.section: Scope, counting rules and universal structure

entries.section: Scope, counting rules and universal structure

entries.description: Noether links invariances to conserved quantities.
